# Index — print exports

*Generated 2026-07-15 from execution_plan.md — regenerate after plan revisions; do not edit these files directly.*

These are the per-module print exports of the Sozialphilosophie execution plan (v3). Each file is self-contained for one module (Part 0 counts as its own module): heading, "Why this module matters", Schedule table with its Sums footer, Inventory, Capability targets, and all weekly blocks / month rows with their callouts — copied verbatim from execution_plan.md. Print one file per sitting.

| File | Contains |
|---|---|
| `01 Front matter — how this plan is operated.md` | Title/version stamp, Scope, Reader/capacity/pacing reference, Calendar anchor, "How to read a Phase I week block" key, Programme overview table, bonus/opt-in pools (L0/L1/L2/L_H), Symbol legend, Programme calendar, Calibration trigger (two-gate) section, "How this plan is operated" (§B Comprehension infrastructure incl. §B.0 Reading Log). |
| `02 Phase I — Foundations.md` | Phase I header (goal, cuts applied at construction, new-in-v3), "Phase I at a glance" module-sums table, Phase I re-spacing note. |
| `03 Part 0 — Orientation.md` | Part 0 (M1–M2, W1–W7): schedule, inventory, capability targets, Weeks 1–8 incl. ⛰ R1 retreat (W8). |
| `04 Module 1 — Hegel.md` | Module 1 (W9–W17): incl. ⚖ W13 calibration evaluation, Weeks 9–17, 🎯 close + 📋 QM1. |
| `05 Module 2 — Marx.md` | Module 2 (W18–W26): Weeks 18–26, Anwendung #1, 🎯 close. |
| `06 Module 3 — Weber.md` | Module 3 (W27–W30): Weeks 27–30, 🎯 close. |
| `07 Module 3A — Lukács.md` | Module 3A (W31–W34): incl. ⚖ W32 second calibration + 📋 QM2, Anwendung #2, 🎯 close, and ⛰ R2 retreat (W35–36). |
| `08 Module 4 — First Frankfurt School.md` | Module 4 (W37–W44): incl. ⚠ W40 ND decision, Anwendung #3, 🎯 close. |
| `09 Module 4A — Pragmatism.md` | Module 4A (W45–W49): Weeks 45–49, 🎯 close. |
| `10 Module 5 — Positivismusstreit + Hermeneutics.md` | Module 5 (W50–W58): Anwendung #4 [bonus], 🎯 close. |
| `11 Motivational Checkpoint + Phase I close.md` | Motivational Checkpoint (M14, W59–W61) incl. Journal Test, Field Report, external-calibration letter; buffer W62; ⛰ R3 retreat (W63–64); transition W65; Phase I summary. |
| `12 Phase II — Systematic Core + Community Entry.md` | Phase II header (M16–M34), "Phase II at a glance" table, Skizze cycle definition and cadence. |
| `13 Module 6 — Habermas TKH.md` | Module 6 (M16–M19): month-level schedule, inventory, capability targets. |
| `14 Module 7 — Honneth + Forst + Fraser.md` | Module 7 (M20–M25). |
| `15 Module 8 — Jaeggi + Allen + Rosa.md` | Module 8 (M25–M30). |
| `16 Streeck block.md` | Streeck block — Polanyi → Legitimationsprobleme → Streeck (M29–M33). |
| `17 Module 9 — Social Epistemology.md` | Module 9 (M30–M32). |
| `18 Module 8A — Außereuropäische Kritik.md` | Module 8A bridge (M32–M34) + 7.18 partial. |
| `19 Phase III — Production, Presentation, Submission.md` | Phase III (M35–M48): Layer C decision, at-a-glance, reading-side inventory, and all month sections R5 → submission. |
| `20 Capacity envelope report.md` | Capacity envelope report (M48 baseline): accounting convention, productive-weeks reconciliation, cut-cascade hours. |
| `21 Reference — Buffer, Conditional, Phase IV register.md` | Reference: buffer/bookkeeping; conditional / Phase IV register; Phase IV connection register (by track, by week/month). |
| `22 Appendix A — falling-behind.md` | Appendix A falling-behind protocols, incl. A.1 cut-list cascade and A.2 Phase III slip protocol. |
| `23 Appendix — Reference tables.md` | Appendix reference tables: A Style × Tier matrix, B session-structure key, C pacing norms, D comprehension infrastructure (D.1/D.2), E retreats, F writing blocks, G community engagement. |
| `24 Maintenance notes + Decisions resolved.md` | Maintenance notes for future revisions; Decisions resolved (2026-07-14). |
